text: AI is changing the modern workplace in significant ways. Many routine tasks, such as data entry and scheduling, are now handled through automation, which saves time and reduces human error. Productivity tools powered by AI help workers analyse information faster and make better decisions. However, this doesn't mean humans are being replaced. Instead, human-AI collaboration is becoming more common, where AI handles repetitive work and people focus on creative and strategic tasks. This shift inevitably leads to job changes, but it also creates new roles, such as AI trainers or ethical oversight specialists. Overall, AI is not just a tool but a partner in the workplace.
